title: rubus × formosulus
intro: Rubus × formosulus, also known as Formosan raspberry or Taiwanese raspberry, is a hybrid of the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus species, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × formosulus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an anti-aging agent due to its high content of antioxidants and vitamins. Rubus × formosulus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
